Binding: CR - Topography value set (required)

Documentation for this format

name: Tumor
title: Tumor
description: Tumor stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage is the central component capturing all key clinical and epidemiological information related to an individual cancer case.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor → CRTumorEncounter
mapping.comment: Maps the DHIS2 Cancer Registry Tumor stage event to a CRTumorEncounter. Individual data elements become Observations referencing this encounter.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crTopography → Topography Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Topography data element to a CRTopographyObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crMorphology → Morphology Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Morphology data element to a CRMorphologyObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crBehaviour → Behaviour Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Behaviour data element to a CRBehaviourObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crGrade → Grade Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Grade data element to a CRGradeObservation (LOINC 33732-9).

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crBasisDiagnosis → Basis of Diagnosis Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Basis diagnosis data element to a CRBasisOfDiagnosisObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crSite → Site Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Site data element to a CRSiteObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crIncidenceDate → Incidence Date Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Incidence date data element to a CRIncidenceDateObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crAge → Age at Incidence Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Age data element to a CRAgeAtIncidenceObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crAddress → Address Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Address data element to a CRAddressObservation.

mapping.name: Mapping: Tumor crTumorNumber → Tumor Number Observation
mapping.comment: Maps the CR - Tumor number data element to a CRTumorNumberObservation.
